title: Solving the 0/1 Knapsack Problem using a Memory Function (Memoization)
description: A flowchart depicting the recursive, memoized algorithm for the 0/1 Knapsack problem. It shows how the algorithm checks a memo table to avoid redundant calculations for the same subproblems, significantly improving efficiency over a naive recursive approach.
relationships: Start Node leads to Check Memo Table
Check Memo Table leads to Subproblem Solved if found, skipping calculation
If not found, leads to checks for including/excluding the current item
The results of include/exclude paths are compared
The maximum value is stored in the Memo Table
The maximum value is then returned
